title: dumasia villosa subsp. leiocarpa
intro: Dumasia villosa subsp. leiocarpa is a plant species that belongs to the family Rutaceae, commonly found in Southeast Asia and India. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Dumasia villosa subsp. leiocarpa include its use in treating fever, respiratory infections, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to protect against oxidative stress and inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
